name: The Back Nine Golf | Port St. Lucie, FL
address: 500 NW Peacock Blvd 500 112, Port St. Lucie, FL 34986
about: The Back Nine Golf in Port St. Lucie, FL, offers a golf simulation experience in a modern, indoor facility. The venue is designed for focused practice and gameplay using advanced simulator technology. Pricing and access details are currently unavailable on the public website, suggesting the services may require direct inquiry or are intended for private groups. The facility provides a controlled environment for golfers to work on their game regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor simulation allows for year-round practice and play
Technology offers a realistic and consistent ball flight experience
Private room options provide an exclusive and focused environment
Ideal for corporate events and group outings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your own clubs for the most authentic simulation experience, though rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food and drink policies are not specified on the website. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on external food and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, a full 18-hole round on a simulator takes approximately one hour to 90 minutes, depending on the number of players in the bay and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically advertise kid-friendly features. Families are encouraged to inquire directly regarding age policies and suitability for children.
